Provider API Keys

Some metadata providers require an API key to query. Add the key issued by the provider here so Stillwater can include them in lookups; providers without a key are skipped silently. Keys are stored encrypted at rest. Read more →

Most metadata providers (Fanart.tv, Discogs, TheAudioDB, and others) require a free or paid API key before they will return data. Paste each key here to enable that provider; keys are encrypted at rest. Providers without a key are skipped during metadata lookups.

MusicBrainz Free No account or API key required
No API key required
Fanart.tv Free Key Free account required to obtain an API key
Key configured

Update API key
